Video.summary: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters

Video.summary: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature’s most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water

Video.summary: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters

Video.summary: Become one with primates and explore their mischiefs with these wild encounters.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.9

Video.summary: Tag along with these good samaritans on some of the most heart-pounding animal rescues.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.1

Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.1

Video.summary: Witness the beauty of the wild and all its magnificent creatures.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.10

Video.summary: Oh, deer! Make room for the deer crossing as these wild woodland creatures take over...your TV.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.2

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: On the last day of their chase the storm hunters are shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror

Video.summary: It’s an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Heartache & Hope

Video.summary: Jaclyn joins Mark in a ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific tornado season on record.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury

Video.summary: While the Chief is out of town, a house fire breaks out in a remote part of Slave Lake.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire

Video.summary: While the Chief is out of town, a house fire breaks out in a remote part of Slave Lake.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Trial By Fire

Video.summary: Alaskan bush pilots risk everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Meet Island Air

Video.summary: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend descent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2

Video.summary: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike

Video.summary: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend descent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2

Video.summary: George tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley and descends into the Erte Ale Volcano.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
